title: QA/QC ENGINEER
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:

Assists in delivering the Q, C, D objectives of the Trackwork QA/QC Work Package:

  •  To ensure that all activities related to quality are properly adhered as per the Quality Plan and contractual requirement.
  •  To monitor the number of defects and non-conformances to minimize NCR’s and associated CONQ.
  •  To ensure that Request For Inspection (RFI) is submitted on his QC inspection activities at least 3 days in advance that requires LTA CR150’s attendance.
  •  To inform and submit all associated inspection and testing reports to the Trackwork Sr. QA/QC Engineer and to the Quality Administrator.
  •  Liaise directly with the following entity regarding Quality issues and submit reports to Trackwork Sr. QA/QC Engineer: - LTA’s representative on site OR Construction and TSA Team

In addition to the above-mentioned items, the additional duties and responsibilities shall include in particular:

  •  To conduct and control Pre and Post concreting inspection & activities (Electrical tests, Trackbed, Turnout and Walkway).
  •  To monitor and control Concrete supplies (slump testing, temperature and cube making).
  •  To monitor and arrange for the collection of concrete cubes on site.
  •  To arrange and conduct 3rd rail components check, torqueing and gauging.
  •  To attend to welding related activities and associated nondestructive & destructive tests as deemed necessary.
  •  To monitor and control Jumper box installation.
  •  Inspection and control of re-work and finishing activities (cable troughs, conduits and pit covers).
  •  To follow and obey instructions from the CR150 Management at all times.

Requirements

  • Minimum with 3 years experience in trackwork/MRT construction projects
  • Degree in Engineering or other relevant qualification
  • Must be familiar with safety procedure within the site
  • Good team player and adaptable to a dynamic environment
  • Posse good leadership and organizing abilities

postedCompany.description:
CHINA RAILWAY FIRST GROUP CO., LTD. SINGAPORE BRANCH

China Railway First Group Co., Ltd. was established in 1950,with its registered office in Xi’an, shaanxi. As the backbone member of China Railway Group Limited, it is certified to possess Super Grade qualification for general contract railway, highway. During the past 65 years since its establishment, CRFG has built its landmark projects almost throughout the whole domestic China. And China Railway First Group Co., Ltd. Singapore Branch was established in 2016, and for developing our new MRT project: Singapore Thomson-East Cost Line T302 Project, we really hope you can join us!
postedCompany.name: CHINA RAILWAY FIRST GROUP CO., LTD. Singapore Branch
